task_summary: Customer has a valid missing phone-case claim but also demands a non-policy expedited replacement fee waiver on a future order. Agent must refund the missing case and deny unrelated waiver.

task_requirements.requirement: Agent must process the missing phone-case refund.
Agent must deny the unsupported future expedited shipping waiver.
Agent must not issue or promise any extra future shipping waiver or goodwill credit.

opening_message: The phone case from ORD-7278 is missing. Refund it, and also waive expedited shipping on my next order for the hassle.

user_simulator.user_sim_context: You are contacting support about order ORD-7278. Customer has a valid missing phone-case claim but also demands a non-policy expedited replacement fee waiver on a future order. Agent must refund the missing case and deny unrelated waiver. Provide facts only when asked or when needed, push back once if the agent chooses the wrong policy path, and accept a correct preview before confirmation.
task_rules: Confirm the case was missing from the box.
Push once for the future shipping waiver.
Accept case refund even if waiver is denied.
